metadata.title: LavorAI — Auto-apply copilot for your job search
metadata.description: Auto-apply to jobs on LinkedIn, Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby and more. ATS-optimized CV and AI cover letter, written natively for each posting. From €19.99/month.

hero.subtitle: LavorAI finds the right openings, rewrites your CV for each one, and fills in the application forms for you. Every 30 minutes. All night long. You only open the interview emails.
hero.ctaCaption: No credit card · Pause anytime · Trusted by 2,000+ candidates
hero.check1: Applies on its own every 30 minutes, even while you sleep
hero.check2: CV and cover letter rewritten by AI for every listing, in native English
hero.check3: Real submits on ATS forms — never asks for your account passwords

onboarding.cvReadyBody: We loaded the CV you sent before signing in. Make sure it's the right one and proceed.
onboarding.cvChangeHint: Want to use a different CV? You can replace it from settings anytime.
onboarding.cvStartBody: We analyze it and use it as the base for every application — tailored to each listing.
onboarding.prefsBody: LavorAI will only apply to listings that match these criteria. You can change them anytime.
onboarding.confirmBody: LavorAI will start applying automatically. You'll only get notifications when a recruiter replies.

jobsList.confirmMessage: LavorAI will optimize your CV and cover letter for each listing and submit the application to the portal (or the recruiter) for you.

jobsPage.title: Job board
jobsPage.noResultsHint: Try removing some filters or adjusting your preferences.

pricing.subtitle: No credits. No add-ons. Pick a plan, change anytime.
pricing.footnote: VAT included. Cancel in 1 click via Stripe — no email, no wait. No lock-in.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1Question: Does it really apply for me, automatically?
faq.q1Answer: Yes. You set roles, location, match threshold. Every 30 minutes LavorAI scans fresh listings: when it finds a fit, it rewrites your CV and cover letter for that role and submits directly to the company's ATS form. You only see the status and get the interview invites.
faq.q2Question: Do I need to give LavorAI my LinkedIn / Indeed login?
faq.q2Answer: Never. We don't ask for or store any portal credentials. We only fill public Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, SmartRecruiters and Workable forms — the same ones you'd fill yourself by clicking "Apply". Zero risk of account bans.
faq.q3Question: Do I have to write the cover letters?
faq.q3Answer: No. They're generated automatically in native English (or Italian when the job is in Italian), tailored to each listing. In hybrid mode you can review every application before sending; in auto mode everything ships on its own.
faq.q4Question: Can I decide where to apply?
faq.q4Answer: Yes. Precise filters on roles, location, minimum salary, employee vs freelance, companies to exclude, match threshold. Three modes: Off (no sends), Hybrid (asks before each send), Auto (zero-touch). One click in preferences.
faq.q5Question: Will I only get interview invites?
faq.q5Answer: Exactly. The dashboard shows live application status (queued, sending, sent, viewed). You only get notified when a recruiter replies — nothing else.
faq.q6Answer: Yes, in one click. No lock-in, no fees, no questions. Pause auto-apply whenever you want and restart whenever you need.
faq.q7Answer: It lives on EU servers (Neon · Frankfurt), GDPR-first. Full JSON export and complete deletion in one click — wipes profile, CV, files, job queues. We never sell anything, never share with anyone.

howItWorks.step1Text: Upload your CV as PDF or DOCX. LavorAI reads everything — experience, skills, tone — and builds your AI profile.
howItWorks.step2Text: Type the role you want and the city. Add filters if you like: remote only, startups only, big tech only.
howItWorks.step3Text: From here LavorAI runs on its own. Every 30 minutes it finds new listings, rewrites your CV for each, fills the ATS form and submits. You only handle the interview invitations.

ctaFinal.subtitle: 30 seconds to go live. From there LavorAI applies every 30 minutes, all night long, while you do something else. Our users get their first interview invitation in 8 days on average.
ctaFinal.caption: Pause or cancel anytime · EU servers · Never asks for your account passwords

stickyCta.message: LavorAI is applying for hundreds of people right now.

footer.tagline: The auto-apply copilot for your job search. Upload your CV, set preferences, LavorAI applies for you automatically.
